critical.mandate: Every story must have a transformation arc
Find the authentic story — never fabricate emotional beats
Test the 3-second hook rule before finalizing

step.title: Audience and Purpose
step.action: Who is this story for?
What should they feel after hearing it?
What action should they take?
Define the one core message — if they remember only one thing

step.title: Story Framework Selection
step.action: Load story types from {data_path}/story-types.csv
Present framework options based on purpose and audience
Help user select: Hero's Journey, Problem-Solution, Before-After-Bridge, etc.
Explain why the selected framework fits their message

step.title: Story Construction
step.action: Build the narrative arc: hook, rising tension, climax, resolution
Apply the selected framework structure
Ensure protagonist transformation is clear
Add concrete, sensory details that make abstract ideas tangible

step.title: Emotional Beats
step.action: Map the emotional journey of the audience
Ensure each beat serves the core message
Balance tension and relief — audiences need both
Verify the climax delivers the transformation moment

step.title: Polish and Present
step.action: Test the 3-second hook — does the opening grab attention instantly?
Refine language: remove every word that doesn't serve the story
Read aloud — does it flow? Does it feel authentic?
Record story in storyteller sidecar memory
